form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Not seen since winning won by 0.5 len Newcastle All Weather October 30 over 3390m defeating Grazeon Sunshine carrying 70kg at $2.50. On debut second of 8 at Kelso September 17 over 3200m, 0.5 len behind Dotties Promise with 69.5kg at $6. Likely to be forward enough to run very well.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last campaign eighth of 12 at Wolverhampton December 15 over 2450m, 43 len behind Siouxfonic with 60.5kg at $26. On debut fourth of 10 at Wolverhampton December 1 over 2400m, 10 len behind Codiak carrying 59kg at $15. Others look to have the edge.

form.formComment: He is resuming after a six months break. Finished off last campaign third of 7 at Goodwood October 12 over 1800m, 5.5 len behind Poseidon's Warrior carrying 60.5kg at $17. On debut second last of 8 at Goodwood September 24 over 2000m, soft track; 6 len behind Bay Of Brilliance carrying 60.5kg at $19. Will benefit greatly from this hitout.
